prompt: Create a simple full-body vector illustration on a clean white background of a friendly young woman standing upright, slightly tall with long legs, suitable as an illustration for student internship or presentation materials. She has black shoulder-length bob hair with a side part, a minimal faceless or softly obscured face, and a calm professional pose. Dress her in an bright orange cardigan-style jacket with exactly 3 visible black buttons over a white shirt, beige high-waisted wide-leg trousers, white socks, and orange flats. Her left arm is extended holding an open gray laptop angled outward; her right hand rests casually in her trouser pocket. Add exactly 1 floating object to the right of her upper body: a teal closed book or notebook with a thick black outline, white page edges, and a centered white heart icon on the cover. Use a cute modern Japanese-style flat illustration aesthetic with thick rounded black outlines, soft cream shading, simple shapes, no text, no shadows beyond subtle flat shading, and plenty of white negative space.
